atomic_facts.fact: Two hands are actively mixing a dry, crumbly substance inside a clear glass bowl.
The substance being mixed appears to be flour or a flour-based dough mixture.
The hands are pressing down and turning the mixture, indicating a kneading or combining action.
The bowl has a visible blue rim at the bottom edge.
